description: LEFT JOIN LATERAL makes the right-side columns nullable when no matching rows exist

columns.name: latest_total
columns.note: LEFT JOIN LATERAL makes right side nullable for unmatched rows

name: lateral_left_join_nullable
query_sql:
-- @name GetUsersWithLatestOrder
-- @returns :many
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.latest_total FROM users u LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT total AS latest_total FROM orders WHERE user_id = u.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS o ON true
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), total INTEGER NOT NULL);

sqlc_comparison.scythe_improvement: scythe correctly marks latest_total as nullable due to LEFT JOIN LATERAL
sqlc_comparison.sqlc_behavior: sqlc may not correctly handle LEFT JOIN LATERAL nullability
